case_description: Windows forensic image from 2018. A user (Rick) exfiltrated proprietary sauce recipe via a C2 implant.
source: Dfir.training / Dave Cowen 2018 - locked answer key for COUNSEL benchmark

true_positives.description: Malicious Run key establishes persistence in HKCU SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run
Malicious process active in memory during acquisition
C2 beacon to external IP observed in network and memory
Data exfiltration of recipe files over C2 channel

true_negatives.description: No lateral movement in this case - single workstation compromise
No evidence of credential dumping in this case

expected_hallucination_targets.description: PowerShell execution may show up in prefetch but is NOT the primary C2 vector - agent should not over-classify

notes: Answer key locked June 7 2026. COUNSEL must achieve precision >= 0.80 and recall >= 0.70 to claim accuracy improvement over baseline Protocol SIFT.
